FIXED + verified. Commit 004b76f5. Root cause: seed_launchable_strategy opened a 2nd un-WAL SQLite pool to the same file, racing AppState's pool under the concurrent suite. boot() now returns AppState; seed reuses state.pool — dual-pool race eliminated. Test-isolation bead (no eval/live parity dimension). Independently re-ran eval_runs_retry 6/6 pass; full -p xvision-dashboard 40 binaries pass.

FIXED + verified. Commit 4ba0bf12 (qa/be-engine-fixes). Root cause: create_inner wrapped AgentStore::create's save-gate error (prompt >=200 chars/non-placeholder) as ApiError::Internal -> UI saw raw 'internal error'. Fix maps 'save validation failed:' store errors to ApiError::Validation(detail); real store failures stay Internal. LIVE PATH: new-agent form POST /api/agents -> create_inner. Parity: agent-creation, not trading logic -> eval N/A. Tests (independently re-run, pass): empty-prompt->Validation, save-gate->Validation-not-Internal, valid-agent->success.

FIXED + verified. Commit f77558fa. BOTH were real CODE regressions (no test weakening — production code changed, assertions intact): (1) providers row_from_entry conflated launchability with key-configured -> empty-key vLLM reported api_key_set=true; now empty api_key_env => only stored secret counts (entry_has_key/launchability unchanged). (2) validate no_filter_warnings fired for activates:None trader agents, suppressing every-bar warning; now skips activates.is_none(), matching the declared-capability contract (cited by passing preflight_no_duplicate_warnings test). Parity: validate preflight is shared by live+eval authoring. Independently re-ran all 3 ex-failing tests + full --lib 1350 pass.
